title: TEA-Sim v2.2.0-rc.1: Portable audit evidence for health information exchange
description: Unreleased release-candidate metadata for a reproducible healthcare audit-evidence boundary and executable reference profile. The package contains a complete synthetic cross-organisational DiagnosticReport disclosure case, a bounded FHIR R4/BALP-facing implementation guide and retained official-validator evidence, registered semantic/signature/receipt/checkpoint mutations, a local A2 Merkle receipt model, and a paired B0-B2 local processing/application-byte/storage-proxy experiment. The package does not claim production EHR performance, hospital deployment readiness, clinical or legal validation, universal FHIR/BALP conformance, large-network scalability, event completeness, backend honesty, public transparency, organisational trust improvement or cost reduction.

creators.name: Clim, Antonio
creators.affiliation: Faculty of Cybernetics, Statistics and Economic Informatics, Bucharest University of Economic Studies
